name: orange-liberia-retailcode-regression
description: Newman regression suite for the RetailCode Orange Liberia API collection

scripts.regression: newman run "RETAILCODE_ORANGE_LIBERIA.postman_collection.json" -e "Retailcode Orange Liberia Dev Copy.postman_environment.json" --insecure --timeout-request 15000 --env-var "token=$TOKEN" --reporters cli,htmlextra,json --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/regression-report.html --reporter-htmlextra-title "Orange Liberia RetailCode API Regression" --reporter-htmlextra-darkTheme --reporter-json-export reports/run-result.json
